reasoning:
Midday review 2:26 PM ET, March 12, 2026. Market in clear downtrend — SPY $668 vs. $695 Feb peak. Retreating today on rising crude prices and credit worries (TradingView). FOMC March 18 upcoming — Fed hawkish/split on rates, top official calling for extended rate pause. Pre-FOMC uncertainty = continued selling pressure likely.

SHORT POSITIONS — all performing well:
- MSFT short (-90 @ $450.96, now $403.25): +$4,290. Still in range $395-410, drifting lower.
- UPST short (-188 @ $46.30, now $26): +$3,816. Massive winner. Near recent lows $25-26. Caution — getting extended, consider taking profits near EOD.
- RIOT short (-434 @ $17.94, now $14.64): +$1,432. Crypto miner weak, trending down.
- MARA short (-212 @ $9.41, now $8.51): +$190. Small winner.

LONG POSITIONS — underperforming:
- AMD (5 @ $230.92, now $198.17): -$163. Tech weakness.
- Crypto longs (BTC, ETH, SOL, AAVE, LINK): All underwater, crypto down broadly.

OPTIONS: No options positions. Would want SPY puts for pre-FOMC bearish setup but AT MAXIMUM POSITION COUNT (10/10). Cannot open new positions without closing existing ones.

DECISION: HOLD all positions. Shorts are working with the bearish market. Will reassess UPST near close — it's very extended and due for a bounce. Will look to potentially take UPST profits near EOD if it continues soft. Monitor AMD — if it breaks further, may want to cut at close. BTC/ETH crypto longs are thesis-broken but appear small in size.

market_data.market_headline: Stocks Retreat Amid Rising Crude Prices and Credit Worries
